test_cases.title: Microcompact clears old compactable toolResults after 60 min gap
test_cases.description: Given 8 compactable toolResults and last assistant 65min ago, when context fires, then oldest 3 are cleared with '[Old tool result content cleared]' and recent 5 kept
steps: Create 8 compactable toolResults with timestamps spread over 65 minutes
Set last assistant message timestamp to now - 65min
Call compressContext with mc config enabled
Verify oldest 3 toolResults replaced with '[Old tool result content cleared]'
Verify recent 5 toolResults unchanged
Verify cleared toolResults are NOT in recall store

test_cases.title: Microcompact does not trigger within gap threshold
test_cases.description: Given last assistant message 30 min ago (< 60 min threshold), Microcompact should not clear any toolResults
steps: Create messages with last assistant at now - 30min
Call compressContext with mc config
Verify no toolResults cleared
Verify mcTriggered=false

test_cases.title: Budget persists largest fresh toolResult when over per-message limit
test_cases.description: Given a user message with 5 toolResults totaling 250K chars, the largest fresh one should be persisted to recall store
steps: Create user message with 5 toolResults (250K total chars)
Call compressContext with budget config enabled
Verify largest toolResult replaced with '<persisted-output>' format
Verify other 4 toolResults unchanged
Verify persisted content is in recall store and recall returns full original

test_cases.title: Budget per-message isolation
test_cases.description: Each user message's toolResults are evaluated independently
steps: Create two user messages, each with toolResults under budget
Call compressContext
Verify no toolResults persisted

test_cases.title: Frozen toolResult keeps same replacement across turns
test_cases.description: A toolResult frozen in Turn 1 uses the same replacement in Turn 2
steps: Turn 1: processBudget persists toolResult A (100K), ffState marks A as frozen
Turn 2: processBudget sees A is frozen, uses cached replacement
Verify replacement string is identical between turns

test_cases.title: Fresh toolResult is evaluated normally
test_cases.description: A new toolResult not in seenIds is evaluated by budget logic
steps: Create messages with a new toolResult B (not frozen)
Call processBudget
Verify B is evaluated as fresh and persisted if over budget

test_cases.title: Compact boundary skips pre-boundary messages
test_cases.description: Messages before compactionSummary are not processed by any compression layer
steps: Create messages with compactionSummary at index 5
Pre-boundary: expired toolResult at index 2 (should NOT be expired)
Post-boundary: normal toolResult at index 8 (should be processed normally)
Call compressContext
Verify index 2 unchanged, index 8 processed normally

test_cases.title: No compactionSummary means all messages processed
test_cases.description: When no compactionSummary exists, all messages participate in compression
steps: Create messages without any compactionSummary
Include an expired toolResult
Call compressContext
Verify expired toolResult is processed normally

test_cases.title: L1 skips toolResults in protected turns
test_cases.description: A 12K toolResult in the last 2 turns is not condensed
steps: Create messages with 12K toolResult in protected turn (last 2 turns)
Call compressContext with l1 config (protectRecentTurns=2)
Verify toolResult NOT condensed

test_cases.title: L1 condenses toolResults outside protected turns
test_cases.description: A 12K toolResult outside the last 2 turns IS condensed
steps: Create messages with 12K toolResult in old turn (outside protected 2 turns)
Call compressContext
Verify toolResult IS condensed with '[Condensed (ID: ...]'

test_cases.title: mc on/off command toggles Microcompact
test_cases.description: /context-engineering mc off disables Microcompact, /context-engineering mc on re-enables it
steps: Execute '/context-engineering mc off'
Trigger context event with expired gap
Verify no Microcompact clearing
Execute '/context-engineering mc on'
Trigger context event with expired gap
Verify Microcompact clearing works

test_cases.title: budget on/off command toggles Budget
test_cases.description: /context-engineering budget off disables Budget, re-enable with on
steps: Execute '/context-engineering budget off'
Trigger context event with over-budget toolResults
Verify no Budget persistence
Execute '/context-engineering budget on'
Verify Budget persistence works

test_cases.title: Native compact produces recognizable compactionSummary
test_cases.description: After Pi native compact, compactionSummary message is detectable by findCompactBoundary
steps: Simulate messages list with compactionSummary format
Call findCompactBoundary
Verify correct index returned

test_cases.title: L0 keepRecent protects newest compactable toolResults
test_cases.description: Even if expired by time, the most recent 5 compactable toolResults are kept
steps: Create 8 expired toolResults (all > 30min)
Set l0.keepRecent=5
Call compressContext
Verify newest 5 NOT expired, oldest 3 expired

test_cases.title: Full pipeline: Microcompact → Budget → L0 → L1 → L2
test_cases.description: All compression stages execute in correct order with correct data flow
steps: Create complex message list: old toolResults, over-budget, large content, high usage
Call compressContext with all layers enabled
Verify execution order: mc first, then budget, then L0, then L1, then L2
Verify stats reflect all layers' contributions
